request_payload.exposure_text: After last year's subway attack, we can't afford to be naive about security. The new domestic surveillance measures might seem like an overreach, but they're exactly what we need to prevent another tragedy. Our allies are already using similar systems - why should we be left vulnerable? It's our duty to support law enforcement with the tools they need to keep us safe. #NationalSecurityFirst
